A

addBalance(double) - Method in class proj4.Passenger
Adds the specified amount to the passenger's balance.
addPassenger(Passenger, boolean, boolean) - Method in class proj4.Trip
Adds a passenger only if the trip is not full and the passenger successfully pays the fare.
addRoute(Route) - Method in class proj4.TransitSystem
Adds a route to the system.
addTrip(Trip) - Method in class proj4.TransitSystem
Adds a trip to the system.
addVehicle(Vehicle) - Method in class proj4.TransitSystem
Adds a vehicle to the system.
AdultPassenger - Class in proj4
Implements the AdultPassenger class.
AdultPassenger(String, int, double) - Constructor for class proj4.AdultPassenger
Parameterized constructor that takes a string name, int id, and a balance as a double.
